name: agentera
description: agentera: entry-point routing, vision, deliberation, planning, autonomous development, optimization, auditing, documentation, visual identity, research, decision-profile mining, and orchestration

codex.invocationHint: Use $skill for explicit invocation, for example $hej. Portable skills may also be invoked implicitly.
limitations: Lifecycle hooks are unavailable for real-time Write/Edit interception in Codex. Run validation commands manually after edits.
profilera collects bounded Codex session corpus data when present and reports any absent source families in corpus metadata.
AGENTERA_HOME must be set in ~/.codex/config.toml under [shell_environment_policy].set so SKILL.md helper-script invocations resolve to the install root; see README install instructions.
Codex hooks are experimental, require host config opt-in, and are not supported on Windows.
Codex does not currently provide equivalent Write/Edit interception for real-time artifact validation.

unsupportedEvents.reason: No equivalent Write/Edit interception is available for real-time artifact validation.
Lifecycle hook support is experimental and disabled by default.
Lifecycle hook support is experimental and disabled by default.

skillMetadata.name: hej
skillMetadata.description: HEJ: Holistic Entry Junction: Orient, Route, Activate. Single point of entry to the suite. Detects fresh vs returning projects, delivers briefings, and routes to the right skill.

skillMetadata.name: inspirera
skillMetadata.description: INSPIRERA: Insight Navigation: Source Pattern Identification and Resonance: Evaluate, Reframe, Assimilate. Analyzes external links and maps concepts, patterns, and primitives to your own projects.

skillMetadata.name: profilera
skillMetadata.description: PROFILERA: Persona Reconstruction: Observable Footprint Indexing Logic: Examine, Reconcile, Articulate. Mines session history to build an agent-consumable decision profile.
skillMetadata.invocationHint: $profilera; limited to available Section 22 corpus source families

requiredCapabilities.name: codex_session_corpus
requiredCapabilities.action: Run profilera extraction; Codex history, session, and config surfaces land in the Section 22 corpus when present, with absent surfaces reported in corpus metadata.

limitations: Codex corpus collection is bounded to known history, session, and config surfaces. Absent surfaces are reported in corpus metadata.

skillMetadata.name: realisera
skillMetadata.description: REALISERA: Relentless Execution: Autonomous Loops Iterating Software: Evolve, Refine, Adapt. Independently decides what to build, evolves projects, and makes structured progress on a codebase.

skillMetadata.name: optimera
skillMetadata.description: OPTIMERA: Objective Pursuit: Targeted Iterative Measurement: Experiment, Record, Advance. Metric-driven optimization that improves any measurable property of a codebase through systematic experimentation.

skillMetadata.name: resonera
skillMetadata.description: RESONERA: Reflective Engagement: Socratic Observation Nexus: Explore, Reframe, Articulate. Structured deliberation through Socratic questioning, producing decision artifacts the rest of the suite consumes.

skillMetadata.name: inspektera
skillMetadata.description: INSPEKTERA: Integrity Navigation: Systematic Pattern Evaluation, Knowledge Tracing: Examine, Report, Advise. Codebase health audit with multi-dimensional evaluation, confidence scoring, and trend tracking.

skillMetadata.name: planera
skillMetadata.description: PLANERA: Planning Logic: Adaptive Notation, Executable Requirements Architecture: Explore, Refine, Articulate. Scale-adaptive planning with behavioral acceptance criteria that bridges deliberation and execution.

skillMetadata.name: visionera
skillMetadata.description: VISIONERA: Visionary Inception: Strategic Imagination, Observation Nexus: Explore, Refine, Articulate. Deep creation and stewardship of VISION.md through codebase exploration, domain research, and aspirational challenge.

skillMetadata.name: dokumentera
skillMetadata.description: DOKUMENTERA: Documentation Origin: Knowledge Unified, Methodology Enforced, Notation Traced: Examine, Record, Articulate. DTC-first documentation creation, maintenance, and verification with DOCS.md coverage tracking.

skillMetadata.name: visualisera
skillMetadata.description: VISUALISERA: Visual Identity: Systematic Unified Aesthetic Language, Intent-driven Style Engineering: Record, Articulate. Creates, refines, and audits DESIGN.md visual identity files with bundled spec and validation.

skillMetadata.name: orkestrera
skillMetadata.description: ORKESTRERA: Orchestration Runtime: Knowledge-coordinated Execution Strategy, Targeted Routing: Evaluate, Resolve, Adapt. Skill-agnostic meta-orchestrator that dispatches skills as subagents, evaluates with inspektera, and loops through plans.
